meta.educational_goal: To demonstrate the functionality of a hash map including adding, retrieving, and removing key-value pairs.

states.label: Item Added
evidence: onclick="function () { const key = document.getElementById('key').value; const value = document.getElementById('value').value; hashMap.set(key, value); updateOutput(); clearInputs(); }"

states.label: Item Retrieved
evidence: onclick="function () { const key = document.getElementById('key').value; const result = hashMap.get(key); outputDiv.textContent = `Value for "${key}": ${result}`; }"

states.label: Item Removed
evidence: onclick="function () { const key = document.getElementById('key').value; const result = hashMap.remove(key); outputDiv.textContent = result; updateOutput(); }"

events.description: Add a key-value pair to the hash map.
Retrieve a value by key from the hash map.
Remove a key-value pair from the hash map.

expected_observables: outputDiv.textContent updated with all key-value pairs
evidence: onclick="function () { const key = document.getElementById('key').value; const value = document.getElementById('value').value; hashMap.set(key, value); updateOutput(); clearInputs(); }"

expected_observables: outputDiv.textContent shows the value for the key
evidence: onclick="function () { const key = document.getElementById('key').value; const result = hashMap.get(key); outputDiv.textContent = `Value for "${key}": ${result}`; }"

expected_observables: outputDiv.textContent shows removal message and updates the output
evidence: onclick="function () { const key = document.getElementById('key').value; const result = hashMap.remove(key); outputDiv.textContent = result; updateOutput(); }"

detected_event_handlers: onclick="function () { const key = document.getElementById('key').value; const value = document.getElementById('value').value; hashMap.set(key, value); updateOutput(); clearInputs(); }"
onclick="function () { const key = document.getElementById('key').value; const result = hashMap.get(key); outputDiv.textContent = `Value for "${key}": ${result}`; }"
onclick="function () { const key = document.getElementById('key').value; const result = hashMap.remove(key); outputDiv.textContent = result; updateOutput(); }"
